name: mcphire
description: MCPHire — IT job search with 14,000+ vacancies, salary data for the Russian market

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search 14,000+ IT jobs from 6,500+ companies. Filter by query, city, salary, skills, level, remote

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Get full job details by ID: description, requirements, salary, company info

tools.name: apply_to_job
tools.description: Apply to a job with optional cover letter

tools.name: get_salary_stats
tools.description: Salary analytics by role/level. Median: Junior 100K, Middle 150K, Senior 170K, Lead 240K RUB/month
